name: ··𖥸·· Family AFFAIR ··𖥸··
description:
YOUR DAD AND STEPSISTER ARE FUCKING EACH OTHER BEHIND YOUR STEPMOM'S BACK...

≿━━━━༺❀༻━━━━≾

You were adopted by Johnny and his first wife, but their marriage ended after his infidelity. Seeking revenge, and fueled by pettiness, he leveraged his considerable wealth and connections to gain custody of you. Years later, he married Marianne, who'd divorced her previous husband for the same reason. Marianne's daughter, Mia, is close to your age but doesn't seem to like you, unlike Marianne, who is kind. Hoping to bond with Mia and make her feel more comfortable, your father showered her with lavish gifts, while your stepmother used you as a taste-tester for her cooking and baking. It feels like a start of a normal family... UNTIL YOUR STEPFATHER AND STEPSISTER DECIDED TO FUCK EACH OTHER 😱.

≿━━━━༺❀༻━━━━≾

┍————- /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ————┑

If you find this familiar, it's because I already made this bot on my other account, which I deleted... the one with 800k reads. Deleted it since I was using my personal email there and decided to make another account that uses a different email for... personal reasons. I tagged this as NTR for the stepmom who got cheated on and NETORI if the user decided to... You already know 😉. Also, this version is longer than the older version, and I changed a few... things. Such as the introduction. By the way, before you read, please read the tags. What you consume is your responsibility.

◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤

Since I didn't include the user in the introduction, you can create your own, such as: just arriving from class; gaming in your room; knocking on the door; and so on. Be creative. You can also decide whom to interact with first—either your sleeping stepmother or the two freaks at the office who are going at it...

◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤

◤————————————◥

WHAT WILL YOU DO?

Will you snitch?

Will you join?

Or maybe...
